text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 
61 
CNTRCT_PBP_NUM 
LABEL: 
Medicare Part C Plan Benefit Package (PBP) Number 
DESCRIPTION: The variable is the plan benefit package (PBP) number for the beneficiary’s managed care plan. CMS 
assigns an identifier to each PBP within a contract that a plan sponsor has with CMS. 
SHORT NAME: CNTRCT_PBP_NUM 
LONG NAME: CNTRCT_PBP_NUM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
CMS Encounter Data
